plot.title: The Midnight Bloom Murder
plot.content:
Renowned botanist Dr. Evelyn Hart was found dead among the rare orchids of the university greenhouse on the night of October 31, 2025. The police have sealed off the area, but the investigation quickly turns inward as the victim's close collaborators become suspects. Marcus Vale, her ambitious research assistant, was seen near the greenhouse after hours. Lena Ortiz, a diligent lab technician, reported the strange activity to security guard Victor Sloan, who also received a cryptic late‑night message from Marcus asking for the greenhouse key. A security log later shows Marcus's keycard entering the greenhouse at 22:45, and Evelyn's diary reveals she was worried about a new toxin she had been developing and Marcus's obsessive curiosity about it. Who killed Dr. Hart, and why?

Characters involved: Dr. Evelyn Hart (Victim), Marcus Vale (Suspect), Lena Ortiz (Witness), Victor Sloan (Accomplice).

caseFiles.title: Evelyn's Diary
caseFiles.content: Evelyn Hart: The new toxin I'm developing could be disastrous if misused. Marcus keeps asking about the formula. I must be careful.

caseFiles.title: Security Log
caseFiles.content: Keycard entry: ID 4521 (Marcus Vale) accessed Greenhouse at 2025-10-31T22:45.

caseFiles.title: Late Night Text
caseFiles.content: Marcus Vale to Victor Sloan: I need the key to the greenhouse tonight. Meet me at the back entrance at 22:30. Bring the bag.

caseFiles.title: Interview with Victor Sloan
caseFiles.content: Interviewer: Victor Sloan. Victor: I was on my break when I heard a door click. I looked and saw Marcus leaving with a bag. I didn't think much of it.

caseFiles.title: Lab Incident Report
caseFiles.content: Lena Ortiz to Victor Sloan: I just saw Marcus Vale lingering near the greenhouse after hours. He seemed nervous. Do you have any idea why he's there? Let me know.

nodes.title: Security Log
nodes.content: Keycard entry: ID 4521 (Marcus Vale) accessed Greenhouse at 2025-10-31T22:45.

edges.title: Security Log
edges.content: Keycard entry: ID 4521 (Marcus Vale) accessed Greenhouse at 2025-10-31T22:45.

edges.title: Security Log
edges.content: Keycard entry: ID 4521 (Marcus Vale) accessed Greenhouse at 2025-10-31T22:45.

solution.motive: Marcus coveted Dr. Hart's groundbreaking toxin research, hoping to sell the formula to a biotech firm for a massive payout. When Evelyn threatened to withhold the data, Marcus silenced her to secure the secret.
